blockingIssues.description: VAL-CORRECT-031 isolation is still not enforced: the completion-gate matrix case duplicates the missing-final-review path, so requireFinalReview-specific guard behavior can regress without test failure, and expectations diverge from the contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align VAL-CORRECT-031 contract wording, runtime expectation, and completion-gate tests so the assertion uniquely validates requireFinalReview behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The new m2-scrutiny-fixes review found contract/test divergence: contract expects failing_final_review + reset command while tests currently assert missing_final_review_payload + /flow-status.
